title: Separate serialize and deserialize tests for known variants: correct oracle discipline
description: Each of the three enums has separate tests for serialization and deserialization of known variants. The oracle is correctly stated in each doc comment (spec section) and the expected strings are hardcoded literals, not produced by calling the code under test. This satisfies the project independent-oracle test policy. Separating serialize and deserialize tests also means a bug that swaps two wire strings in one direction is caught independently.
